Title: ZenPaws Ergonomic Elevated Bowl System
Body (HTML):
Feeding from floor level causes pets to bend their necks unnaturally, straining their spine and putting pressure on their digestive tract (often causing bloating, vomiting, and acid reflux). The ZenPaws Elevated Bowl features 4 adjustable heights and a 15-degree tilt angle to create the natural posture veterinarians recommend.

Key Benefits:

  • 📐 15° Tilted Platform: Reduces neck strain and swallowed air, drastically reducing post-meal vomiting and indigestion.
  • 📏 Adjusts as They Grow: Four height settings make it perfect for dogs and cats of all sizes.
  • 🥣 Premium Ceramic Bowls: Includes two lead-free, food-grade ceramic bowls that prevent plastic-allergy skin issues.
  • 🚫 Anti-Slip Base: Stays firm and protects hardwood floors.
